per_testcase.name: Verify Heading Content
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: h3 text includes exact string 'Music Album Collection'
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage has a heading element with the text 'Music Album Collection'.

per_testcase.name: Verify Input and Button Types
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage has input fields for album name, release year, genre, and favorite checkbox.

per_testcase.name: Verify Button Background Color
per_testcase.found_in_description: The add album button has a background color of 'rgb(76, 175, 80)' or '#4CAF50'.

per_testcase.name: Verify Button Text
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: button#addAlbumBtn text includes exact string 'Add Album'
per_testcase.found_in_description: The add album button has a label 'Add Album'.

per_testcase.name: Verify Placeholder and Label Texts
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: placeholders and labels for album name, release year, genre, and favorite
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage has placeholders for album name and release year, and labels for genre and favorite.
missing_from_description: labels for album name and release year

per_testcase.name: Verify Page Title
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: page title includes exact string 'Music Album Collection Manager'
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage title is 'Music Album Collection Manager'.

per_testcase.name: Verify Album Initial State and Validation
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: initial album list content, initial favorite list content, and error message
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage has empty album and favorite lists initially, and an error message 'Please fill out all fields!' when the input fields are not filled.

per_testcase.name: Verify Normal Album Addition and Reset
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: album list content, input fields, and favorite checkbox after submission
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage updates the album list and clears the input fields after submission.

per_testcase.name: Verify Favorite Album Addition and Reset
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: favorite list content, input fields, and favorite checkbox after submission
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage updates the favorite album list and clears the input fields after submission.
